today_in_history_posts.title: RFC for BIP: Derivation scheme for P2WPKH-nested-in-P2SH based accounts
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Daniel Weigl has prepared a Bitcoin Improvement Proposal for a BIP44-compliant wallet.
- The proposal is available on GitHub for community comments.
- He has requested a proposal number, pending no objections.

today_in_history_posts.title: [BOLT RFC#1] Encryption spec
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The developer admires the encryption layer for its generic and simple design.
- Questions include the use of multiple public keys and mitigation of MITM attacks.
- Concerns are raised about message indistinguishability, timing analysis, and the ack field's role.

today_in_history_posts.title: Deflationary money is a Good Thing
today_in_history_posts.summary: - Passive and active investments differ in management intensity and asset involvement.  - Misalignment in passive investment may lead to underutilized assets and societal issues.  - The article discusses a hybrid currency system to stabilize economic fluctuations.
